overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic corporate facility in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through neon-lit corridors transitioning from cyan to red lighting, eventually reaching a high-tech boardroom with holographic projections. The environment features sleek metallic surfaces, holographic displays, and dramatic artificial lighting.

events.description: passing through glass doorway from conference room into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern conference room toward a glass exit, entering a sleek corridor

entered.detail: long sleek black conference table with scattered papers and devices
wall-mounted screens showing cyan data visualizations and graphs
modern ergonomic chairs arranged around the conference table
transparent glass double doors leading to the corridor
red emergency lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a high-tech corporate conference room featuring a long table, ergonomic chairs, and holographic data displays on the walls. The camera moves steadily forward, passing through a glass doorway into a connecting corridor. The environment is dimly lit with artificial cyan lighting and polished marble floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: main corridor with glass-walled meeting room

events.description: passing by a glass-walled side room containing seated corporate figures

agents.ego_description: proceeding down a sleek corridor with glass walls, observing a side meeting room

notable_agents.action: group of corporate figures seated around a meeting table behind glass walls

entered.detail: transparent glass partitions revealing interior meeting rooms
conference room visible through glass with figures seated inside
circular corporate logo mounted on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow corridor with glass walls revealing a side meeting room where corporate figures are seated. The lighting remains cyan and artificial. A circular wall emblem appears on the right as the corridor continues forward, with red lighting becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure corridor with red neon accent lighting

events.description: corridor lighting shifts dramatically from cyan to intense red neon strips
approaching and passing through a security doorway into a brighter area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light, approaching a secure doorway

entered.detail: bright red neon light strips running along the ceiling and walls
dark metallic corridor walls with illuminated red accents
doorway emitting bright blue light at the end of the red corridor

segments.scene_description: The corridor transforms into a narrow passageway dominated by intense red neon lighting strips along the ceiling and walls. The environment feels more secure and restricted. The camera approaches a doorway glowing with blue light at the far end, suggesting a transition to another area.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive boardroom with holographic projection system

events.description: entering a large dark room with a massive holographic projection of a meeting

agents.ego_description: entering a high-tech boardroom and approaching a large holographic projection of a virtual meeting

notable_agents.action: holographic projections of corporate executives seated around a virtual conference table

entered.detail: large holographic table displaying glowing virtual interface elements
translucent ghostly projections of people seated around the table
massive display wall showing cityscape or data in the background
highly polished dark floor reflecting the holographic lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a vast executive boardroom dominated by a massive holographic projection of a virtual meeting. Translucent figures of corporate executives appear seated around a glowing table. The room is dark except for the bright holographic displays and cyan accent lighting, creating a dramatic high-tech atmosphere as the camera approaches the projection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile corporate facility that transitions from cool cyan corridors into a high-security red zone before culminating in a grand holographic boardroom. It begins inside a high-tech conference room with holographic data displays, moving steadily forward through a glass doorway into a dimly lit corridor of polished marble and cyan light. As the camera glides past glass walls revealing seated corporate figures and a circular wall emblem, the cool tones gradually give way to intense red neon strips that dominate a narrow, restricted passageway. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a glowing blue doorway at the end of the red corridor, finally opening into a vast, dark executive boardroom. This final space is illuminated by a massive holographic projection of translucent executives seated around a glowing table, framed by sharp cyan accent lighting.
